## Goal
Determine the largest line number `n` such that the prefix of the provided novel text ends at a coherent, complete narrative boundary.

## Approach
I counted the lines from the start of the input text through the final displayed line. The excerpt ends on a complete sentence and coherent paragraph about Harry receiving a lemon ice pop at the zoo, with no mid-sentence cutoff.

## Result
The largest valid `n` is 178.
